# Remix Icon — inline SVG subset

Vendored from [Remix Icon](https://remixicon.com/) (Remix Icon License — commercial/modify/distribute OK). These are ~90 commonly-used icons for artifact pages. Each entry is a complete, self-contained `<svg>` — **copy the whole block inline** into your page; do not link the Remix Icon CDN (the strict CSP blocks it).

Usage:
- Paste the `<svg>` where you need the icon. It inherits color via `fill="currentColor"` — set `color` on the parent.
- Size with `width`/`height` or CSS `svg{width:1em;height:1em;vertical-align:middle}`.
- The `ri-<name>` heading is for reference; the SVG is what you copy.
